metadata.use_case: Use AI to generate insight-ready slides for Monthly Business Review in healthcare claims
metadata.user_context: Senior PM at a healthcare tech company
metadata.ai_literacy_signals: Understands prompt chaining and retrieval but struggles with fine-tuning
metadata.learning_objectives: Be able to autonomously design and implement AI-powered reporting workflows
metadata.focused_subtask: Summarize 10 Tableau dashboards into 6 stakeholder-ready insights for a Monthly Business Review using GPT

items.title: ### 2. **Tableau for Healthcare**
items.snippet: - **Udemy Course - Tableau For Healthcare**: This course is designed for those interested in healthcare analytics using Tableau, though it does not specifically cover GPT-4 integration. It's useful for understanding healthcare data visualization.
items.reflection: - adjacent: while the course could potentially enhance the user's understanding of healthcare data visualization using tableau, it does not directly address the specific task of summarizing tableau dashboards into stakeholder-ready insights using gpt-4. the user also already has familiarity with tableau, and the course does not cover the missing skills of prompt engineering and automation workflows.

items.title: **Tableau Pulse and AI**
items.snippet: Learn about Tableau Pulse, which leverages AI to automate analysis and generate insights in natural language. This resource is particularly valuable for understanding how to utilize Tableau's capabilities in generating automated reports and insights that can be enhanced with GPT-4.
items.reflection: - yes: the content introduces tableau pulse, an ai-powered tool that can automate analysis and generate insights. this directly aligns with the learner's task of summarizing tableau dashboards into stakeholder-ready insights. it also addresses their familiarity with tableau and gpt-4, and their need to learn about automation workflows.

items.reflection: - adjacent: the content is related as it discusses using gpt for data analytics, which could potentially be applied to summarizing tableau dashboards. however, it doesn't directly address the specific task of creating stakeholder-ready insights for a monthly business review. the learner may still find useful information, but additional resources would be needed to fully address the task.

items.query: "Prompt engineering examples for transforming Tableau dashboards into business review insights using GPT"
items.title: How I Built a ONE CLICK Excel Dashboard with ChatGPT 😎
items.description: Prompt 1* This is the structure of my sales data in JSON format. Understand the structure and suggest five key data visualization ...
items.transcript: hi guys in this video we're going to turn this boring table of data into this interactive dashboard where you can easily see what's going on with the data sounds like magic right and to do this we're going to use just one tool and that is chbd so you can have your data in any format it can be an Excel file a Google sheet or a CSV file we're going to feed this data into chat GPD and get it into a beautiful visual dashboard where you can easily get clear insights so what are you waiting for I'm brand from upsite Learners and let's get started so here's the data that I have it's a sales data which we are going to use as an example now if we directly add this large amount of data into chat GPT and ask it to create a dashboard it won't be able to give us accurate results as it can't process large amounts of data so we're going to use a different approach so instead of uploading all the data to chat jbt we are only going to ask you to create a HTML web page that will process our data directly into our web browser then it'll show us the results just like this this keeps our data private which means we don't have to give our whole data to chat GPT and it lets us work with larger data sets that would exceed charge's limits so to create the HTML web page we're going to upload a small sample of our data to chat jpt and then ask it to come up with a plan on how to create a dashboard so we are going to do this in just three parts the first part is to prepare the sample data to do that we are going to do two steps the first step is to download your data as a CSP file so if you have Excel or Google Sheets you can easily save the file as CSV just go to file click export then select CSV and click save and your CSV file will be downloaded to your computer now let's go to step two which is to convert our CSV file into a Json file before we ask Chad jpt to create the dashboard we need to provide a small sample of our data in a structured format while our data is currently in CSP format we'll convert it into a Json format which is better suited for creating webbased dashboards to convert the file into a Json format just go to Google Now search for CSV to Json converter click on the first link and it will take you to this page here click CSP to Json then click choose file add your CSV file and click convert as you can see the file has been converted into Json now click download and the Json file will be downloaded to your computer okay so now we have successfully converted the CSV file into a Json format now that we have our data ready in Json format next let's go to part two which is to generate ideas to create our dashboard in this part we'll get CH GPT to suggest different ways we can visualize our data in dashboards like charts graphs and other visual elements that help us understand our data better so to get ideas from chat GPT first we need to give a sample data to chat GPT and to do that just copy part of the data from the Json output here which contains the column names and the values now make sure to copy only the first few rows of data so let's copy it and paste it to chpd once you have pasted the sample data here next let's ask for ideas for our dashboard to do that just copy the first prompt given in the description below and paste it here here I've asked chat GP to understand the data structure and suggest five key data metrics to create the dashboard and explain each one in detail as you can see chat GP has given us five visualization BS based on the data that we gave it also suggest us the type of charts that we can use along with a detailed explanation for each one of them if you want to change any visualization metric you can directly ask charp to change it so let's ask it to change the visual metric for the second one and let's ask it to convert it into a pie chart and as you can see the visual type has been changed from a heat map to a pie chart okay now that we've got the visual ideas we can start creating the dashboard web page with these particular ideas so next let's go to the final part which is to create the dashboard to create the dashboard we're going to do three simple steps the first step is to ask CH GPD to generate the HTML code for our dashboard and to do that just copy the second prompt from the description and paste it to chat GPD and you can see that it has generated the HTML code for the dashboard also it has given us detailed descriptions on how to use it now instead of manually adding this code to HTML file we can just ask chat GPT to create a downloadable HTML file which we can just open and upload a Json file so let's go to step two which is to download the HTML file now to download it just copy the third font to the description and add it to CH GPT and as you can see it has given us a downloadable link for the HTML file so just click on it and it will download to your computer once you have downloaded the HTML file let's go to the final step which is to create the dashboard by uploading the Json file and to create the dashboard let's open the HTML file and as you can see we've got the HTML web page which has the upload file option as mentioned in the prompt let's click choose file and upload the Json file that we downloaded earlier and you can see our sales dashboard has been created with the data that we provided with five different visuals now if you want to change the design of your dashboard simply tell chat GPT what you have in mind and ask it to create a downloadable file with a new design so just copy the fourth prompt in the description below and paste it in CHP here I've asked you to change the dashboard style and adjust the width of the charts to 40% and give it as a HTML file as you can see we have got the file so let's download it and now if you upload the Json file you can see that we have a new style for our sales dashboard okay guys before we move on I want to quickly show you a tool that will be super useful if you're trying to rank Your Business website on Google so check this out I'll just go to the tool enter the key that I want to rank for on Google and then click create outline now the tool will create a blog outline that targets this keyword now if I click generate all you can see that I get an SEO friendly blog with stunning images now if I click here I can publish the blog on my website and start getting traffic from Google it's that easy so if you're looking to rank your website on Google then you can grab this tool from grav.com at just $97 per year okay so now that you've created our dashboard but how do we confirm the data present in the dashboard is based on the that we provided to verify that let's compare the data in the dashboard with our original Excel data just look at the chart here it says that the overall sales in the technology category is $836,000 let's confirm this with the Excel sheet first I'll filter the technology category to do this click on the category column go to the data Tab and click filter next click here to open this drop down deselect everything select technology and then click okay as you can see the technology category is now filtered next I'm checking the sales column and the total sales value for technology is 836 th000 which matches the chart this confirms that the data in our dashboard matches the data in our Excel file okay so that's it guys this is how you can create interactive sales dashboard using chat GPD but before we wrap up I want to remind you about gravity right an AI tool that helps you write 3,000 plus words of well researched blogs effortlessly you can get it for one full year at just $97 check out the link in the description for more details and guys if you like this video do give it a thumbs up and make sure you subscribe to website learners for more cool videos like this one thanks for watching I'll see you in the next video Until then take care bye-bye [Music]
items.reflection: - adjacent: while the content is related to using gpt for data visualization, it does not directly address the task of summarizing tableau dashboards into stakeholder-ready insights. it could potentially provide some useful tips or methods, but it would not be sufficient on its own to complete the task.
